summary: Sl√É¬°turf√É¬©lags Su√É¬∞urlands svf. engages in the animals slaughtering and meat processing business in Iceland. The company offers meat and meat past, and cooked products, as well as smocked and frozen lamb meat. It also provides horse and pork meat; salted meat products; and sausages and trimmings. The company also exports salted lamb skins and salted hides. The company was founded in 1907 and is based in Reykjavik, Iceland.
